title: cryptogramma cascadensis
intro: Cryptogramma cascadensis, also known as the Rocky Mountain holly fern or western holly fern, is a species of holly fern native to western North America, characterized by its dark green, leathery fronds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cryptogramma cascadensis include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as possibly helping to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, have been used in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
